title: [codereview-1] P2: COAP_RESOURCE_DEFINE uses 'lichen_coap' instead of 'lichen_coap_server' in coap_*.c files (coap_msg.c, coap_keys.c, coap_config.c, coap_location.c, coap_dtn.c, coap_status.c?)
description: Resources not registering to the COAP_SERVICE_DEFINE(lichen_coap_server). Change all to use lichen_coap_server to match service and linker section. Discovered during coap_server handler fix per 5ky0. Also affects tests if any use the old name.
close_reason: Fixed by updating all COAP_RESOURCE_DEFINE(..., lichen_coap, ...) to lichen_coap_server in coap_msg.c, coap_dtn.c, coap_location.c, coap_config.c, coap_keys.c (and server already used it). Updated comments. Matches service and linker section. 3 codereview passes now clean.
